title: calceolaria extensa
intro: Calceolaria extensa, also known as Slipper Flower, is a flowering plant species native to the Andes mountain range. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may be beneficial in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Calceolaria extensa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues. Calceolaria extensa is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used as a tincture or added to capsules for herbal preparations.
